name: Skyharbour Resources Ltd.
description: Skyharbour Resources Ltd. is a pre-eminent uranium exploration and project generator company with an extensive portfolio of projects in the Athabasca Basin of Saskatchewan, Canada. The company holds an interest in over 580,000 hectares of mineral claims, including its flagship Moore Uranium Project and the South Falcon Point Project. Skyharbour utilizes a prospect generator model, partnering with other companies to fund exploration and advance its secondary projects while focusing its own resources on high-grade discovery potential at its core assets. The company is well-positioned to benefit from the growing global demand for carbon-free nuclear energy.
